description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.
You gain a +1 bonus to Armour Class while wearing armour.

available_to: Fighter; Paladin; Ranger; College of Swords Bard; Champion Fighter
description: When wielding a melee weapon that is not Two-Handed in one hand and no weapon in the other, you deal 2 additional damage with that weapon.
When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for a Two-Handed melee weapon attack, that die is rerolled once.
While holding a shield, use your reaction to impose Disadvantage on an enemy attacking a nearby ally you can see.

available_to: Fighter; Ranger; College of Swords Bard; Champion Fighter
description: When you make an off-hand attack, add your Ability Score Modifier to the attack's damage.
